title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist AI system automates medical discovery by identifying promising treatment pathways for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and other diseases. Robin is a complementary agent system with a consensus mechanism that validates findings across multiple discovery runs.
